title: ModelRuntime trait surface (engine-agnostic)
goal: Define the `ModelRuntime` async trait with the full engine-agnostic surface per AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT: load, unload, generate (streaming TokenStream), score, embed, capabilities, kv_cache, lora_stack, steering_hooks, cancel. Trait MUST not leak engine-specific types — all parameters and return shapes use handshake-owned types defined in this MT.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/trait.rs declaring the trait + companion types (LoadSpec, GenerateRequest, TokenStream alias, Score, Embedding, KvCacheHandle, LoraStackHandle, SteeringHookHandle, CancellationToken, ModelId). mod.rs re-exports.
implementation_notes: Per spec §4.6.1 (AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT) trait methods: `async fn load(&mut self, spec: LoadSpec) -> Result<ModelId, ModelRuntimeError>`; `async fn unload(&mut self, id: ModelId) -> Result<(), ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn generate(&self, req: GenerateRequest) -> TokenStream` where `TokenStream = Pin<Box<dyn Stream<Item = Result<GeneratedToken, ModelRuntimeError>> + Send>>` (futures::Stream); `async fn score(&self, id: ModelId, sequence: Vec<u32>) -> Result<Score, ModelRuntimeError>`; `async fn embed(&self, id: ModelId, text: &str) -> Result<Embedding, ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn capabilities(&self, id: ModelId) -> Result<&ModelCapabilities, ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn kv_cache(&self, id: ModelId) -> Result<KvCacheHandle, ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn lora_stack(&self, id: ModelId) -> Result<LoraStackHandle, ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn steering_hooks(&self, id: ModelId) -> Result<SteeringHookHandle, ModelRuntimeError>`; `fn cancel(&self, token: CancellationToken)`. Companion types in types.rs: `ModelId(Uuid)` minted via uuid::Uuid::now_v7() per HBR-INT-008; `LoadSpec { artifact_path: PathBuf, sha256_expected: String, runtime_kind: RuntimeKind (enum LlamaCpp|Candle), sampling_defaults: SamplingParams, kv_cache_policy: KvCachePolicy, declared_capabilities: ModelCapabilities }`; `GenerateRequest { id: ModelId, prompt: GenPrompt, sampling: SamplingParams, lora_overrides: Vec<LoraId>, steering_overrides: Vec<SteeringVectorId>, kv_prefix_handle: Option<KvPrefixHandle>, cancel: CancellationToken, max_tokens: u32, stop_sequences: Vec<String>, structured_decoding: Option<JsonSchema> }`; `GeneratedToken { token_id: u32, text: String, logprob: Option<f32>, finish_reason: Option<FinishReason> }`; `KvCacheHandle`, `LoraStackHandle`, `SteeringHookHandle` are opaque handle structs (sub-traits like KvCacheOps come later in MT-063..MT-068). `CancellationToken` wraps tokio::sync::CancellationToken or similar. `SamplingParams { temperature, top_p, top_k, min_p, repetition_penalty, frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, seed }` all Option<f32>/u32. async_trait::async_trait attribute on the trait. The trait must be `Send + Sync` so it can be Arc<dyn ModelRuntime> in LlmClient routing (MT-070). Implement Debug + Clone for ModelId. UUID v7 per HBR-INT-008 mandatory for ModelId mint.
risk_if_missed: Adapter MTs cannot land coherently; engine-specific types leak into callers; LlmClient cannot route uniformly.
validator_focus: Engine-specific types do not appear in the trait method signatures; trait is Send+Sync; ModelId mint uses now_v7(); compile-only test ensures trait is object-safe (`fn _check(_: &dyn ModelRuntime)`).

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Grep the trait surface for llama_cpp_2:: / candle_core:: imports — must be zero.
Compile-only test confirms trait is object-safe (`&dyn ModelRuntime` constructible).
ModelId uses Uuid::now_v7() (HBR-INT-008); golden test asserts v7 timestamp prefix monotonic across mints.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: Trait surface is engine-agnostic, object-safe via async_trait, Send+Sync, all fallible methods are Result-returning, and capabilities/handles use Handshake-owned types per AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT. CONCERN: load/unload take &mut self, which makes the trait unusable behind Arc<dyn ModelRuntime> (the very shape LocalRouter and Tauri state hold); production load wiring has no path today.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: Trait surface is engine-agnostic, object-safe via async_trait, Send+Sync, all fallible methods are Result-returning, and capabilities/handles use Handshake-owned types per AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-TRAIT. CONCERN: load/unload take &mut self, which makes the trait unusable behind Arc<dyn ModelRuntime> (the very shape LocalRouter and Tauri state hold); production load wiring has no path today.
